title: Thematic
description: API/Core mod for the Thematic Superheroes Mod.
body:
# Thematic (Core / API)

Thematic is the ultimate superhero mod for Minecraft, allowing you to suit up as your favorite heroes and villains. Discord is linked [here](https://discord.gg/RZECCz3hh7).

> **NOTE:** This is the **Core API**. It contains the code, systems, and logic required to run Thematic. It does **not** contain any suits or content by itself.

## Content Packs
To get suits (like Superman, Batman, HULK, etc.), you **MUST** install a content pack alongside this mod.

- [Thematic: Heroes](https://modrinth.com/mod/thematic-superheroes) - The main content pack containing DC, Marvel, and other characters.

## Installation

We recommend using CurseForge/Modrinth so your dependencies install automatically.

**Required Dependencies:**
*   [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
*   [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
*   [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
*   [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)
*   [Vic's Point Blank](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vics-point-blank)

**Manual Installation:**
1.  Install Fabric Loader.
2.  Download all Required Dependencies.
3.  Download Thematic (Core) (this file).
4.  Download **Thematic: Heroes** (or other content packs).
5.  Place all jars in your `mods` folder.
